texto: Anxiously, he touched the lump on his head again, then felt his injured leg, groaning. "The whole affair is a mystery to me," he said. "Who would want to steal anything from me?" "Perhaps a thief...?" ventured Julius.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Henry Winterfeld que provoca temas ligados a humor. Ao questionar “Anxiously, he touched the lump on his head again, then felt his injured leg, groaning. "The whole…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, crime, problem-solving, com foco em humor e problem-solving.

frase_original: Anxiously, he touched the lump on his head again, then felt his injured leg, groaning. "The whole affair is a mystery to me," he said. "Who would want to steal anything from me?" "Perhaps a thief...?" ventured Julius.
